chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 335 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.1683/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.01 & 07 3. For orders on Misc. No.1684/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.1685/2025 5. For hearing of main case 28.01.2025 Petitioner, Gul Badeen Khan, is present in person 1. Granted. 2-5. This matter pertains to the assertion of inflated electricity bills are being issued to the petitioner. The appropriate forum in such regard is the Electricity Inspector, therefore, direct recourse to the writ jurisdiction appears misconceived. Petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
